source_brief: Prepare the MBSH reunion site for a V2 post-launch iteration proof without starting implementation.
audience: MBSH Class of 1996 reunion attendees, organizers, sponsors, and future FAMtastic Studio operators reviewing post-launch iteration behavior.
opportunity: Use MBSH V2 to prove that Studio can refine a launched cinematic event site through component/slot replacement, media registry discipline, QA gates, and learning capture.
positioning: MBSH V2 is a post-launch iteration proof for the Studio system, not a fresh site build.
open_questions: Which MBSH V2 backlog items are production blockers versus polish?
Which deferred assets already exist and which need Media Library intake?
Which pages expose named slots suitable for safe replacement?
constraints: Do not start MBSH V2 implementation in Slice 1.
Do not add major backend behavior to site-studio/server.js.
Any projected cost above $50 requires Fritz approval.
research_summary: The completed research package shows FAMtastic should prove intelligence, capability truth, run ledger, proof packet, and learning capture before site work.
assumptions: MBSH V2 remains the first post-launch iteration proof after the execution substrate exists.
next_recommended_action: Create Slice 2 server modularization first safe extraction plan/proof before backend-heavy Studio behavior.
